title: Peter
writer: Felix Jackson, Sándor Nádas, János Vaszary
actors: Franciska Gaal, Felix Bressart, Friedl Czepa
plot: A 17 year old girl, hustling money as a street musician after being evicted from her family home, is forced to disguise as a boy,is charged with a crime, and causes later confusion due to her double identity.
